confirmations.deleteLibrary: Delete this library? Knowledge items and folders will be moved to the fallback library.
confirmations.discardChanges: Discard unsaved changes and revert to the last saved version?
confirmations.resetLibraryAccess: Switch this library back to open access and clear the custom reader and writer lists?

messages.restrictedEmpty: If you do not add any readers or writers, only the owner and knowledge administrators will be able to access this library.

editLibrary.slugWarning: Renaming this library also changes its URL slug.
editLibrary.title: Library Settings

messages.crossLibraryAdminOnly: Cross-library folder moves are admin-only. You can only reparent within the current library.
messages.templatesOnly: Folders in the Templates library can only be reorganized within Templates.

confirmations.deleteFolder: Delete this folder? Documents will be moved to Unfiled. Folders with subfolders cannot be deleted.

messages.dragSingleLibraryOnly: Drag is available only in a single-library view.
messages.dragToFolderOrLibrary: Drag to a folder or another library
messages.managedDocsCannotDelete: Managed docs cannot be deleted from Knowledge.
messages.managedDocsCannotMove: Managed docs cannot be moved from Knowledge.
messages.moveTemplatesSeparately: Move template documents separately from other libraries.
messages.noPermissionMoveDocuments: You do not have permission to move documents.
messages.noPermissionMoveSelectedDocuments: You do not have write access to every selected document.
messages.selectSingleLibraryToMove: Select documents from a single library to move them.

messages.crossLibraryAdminOnly: Cross-library moves are admin-only. You can move the selected documents within their current library.
messages.selectSingleLibrary: Select documents from a single library to move them, or use an admin account for a cross-library move.
messages.templatesBlocked: Template documents cannot be moved together with documents from other libraries.
messages.templatesMixed: Template documents must be moved separately from documents in other libraries.
messages.templatesOnly: Documents in the Templates library can only be reorganized within Templates.

scope.noTeamAssigned: You are not assigned to a team.

messages.saveFirst: Save first to manage owners, reviewers, and approvers.

tooltips.managedFolder: Managed docs keep folder placement controlled by the source workspace.
tooltips.managedRelations: Managed docs keep source relations read-only in Knowledge.
tooltips.managedStatus: Managed docs keep status controlled by the source workspace. Knowledge review workflow is unavailable.
tooltips.managedTemplate: Managed docs keep the template controlled by the source workspace.
tooltips.managedType: Managed docs keep the document type controlled by the source workspace.
tooltips.managedWorkflow: Managed docs do not use the Knowledge review workflow.

fields.decisionNotePlaceholder: Optional for approval, required for requesting changes

messages.approversWaiting: Approvers are waiting. They will be notified only after all reviewers approve.
messages.noActiveWorkflow: No active workflow. You can still publish directly, or assign reviewers and approvers to use the optional review flow.
messages.publishWhenApproversApprove: This document will publish only when all approvers approve.
messages.publishWhenReviewersApprove: This document will publish when all reviewers approve.
messages.unavailableForManagedDocs: Review workflow is unavailable for managed integrated docs.

messages.introPrefix: Types classify documents. Templates define structure and content. The built-in
messages.introSuffix: type is the fallback for blank documents.

messages.acquireLockBeforeImport: Acquire an editing lock before importing a document.
messages.importAvailableAfterCreate: Document import is available after the document is created.
messages.inReview: This document is in review. Editing is disabled until the workflow is approved, changes are requested, or the review is cancelled.
messages.lockExpired: Editing lock expired. Re-enter edit mode to continue.
messages.lockedByUser: This knowledge article is locked by {{user}}{{until}}. You can read it while the lock is active.
messages.readOnlyAccess: You have read-only access to this knowledge article.
messages.selectOwnerBeforeSaving: Select an owner before saving contributors.
